name: hologres-cli
description: AI-agent-friendly Hologres CLI with safety guardrails and structured JSON output. Use for database operations, schema inspection, SQL execution, data import/export, Dynamic Table lifecycle management (V3.1+ syntax), and GUC parameter management. Triggers: "hologres cli", "hologres command", "hologres database", "dynamic table", "hologres查询", "hologres guc", "GUC parameter"
